name: openwiki
description: Agent-native OpenWiki documentation workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and maintain repository docs with Codex.
interface.longDescription: Run the OpenWiki documentation workflow with Codex's native model and tools, without configuring a separate OpenWiki provider API key.
defaultPrompt: Initialize OpenWiki documentation for this repo.
Update the OpenWiki docs from recent changes.
Answer this from the OpenWiki docs.
